channel.title: Docs on Gabriele Sicuro
channel.description: Recent content in Docs on Gabriele Sicuro

item.title: Former and current students
item.description: PhD students # From 2021, Urte Adomaityte. King’s College London. From 2025, Rodrigo Emilio Perez Ortiz. Alma Mater Università di Bologna. Master students # 2016, Matteo P. D’Achille. Thesis: On two assignment problems, co-supervised with Sergio Caracciolo, University of Milan. 2018, Gianmarco Perrupato. Thesis: Study of matching on the Bethe lattice, co-supervised with Giorgio Parisi, Sapienza University of Rome. 2021, Anshul Toshniwal. Thesis: The planted multi-index matching problem, co-supervised with Lenka Zdeborová, EPFL.
